rules: No Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans.
Use mono font for overlines, labels, and all code blocks with tracking-[0.1em].
H1 size fluid clamp max text-6xl, strict tracking-tighter.

marketing.grid: Tetris Bento Grid (grid-cols-12, wide gaps gap-8 to gap-12)

dashboard_ide.alignment: Strict grid, full utilization of screen real estate

surfaces_and_borders.marketing_cards: 1px border-white/10, bg-white/[0.02], subtle backdrop blur, 'Tracing Beam' glow on hover.
surfaces_and_borders.dashboard_panels: Flat dark bg (#121212), rigid 1px border (#3F3F46), sharp corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none). No soft shadows.
surfaces_and_borders.header: Crystal glassmorphism sticky header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) with 1px bottom border border-white/10.

animations.marketing: Lenis smooth scroll, Framer Motion for fade-up-stagger, Tracing Beam border loops.
animations.dashboard: Micro-interactions only. Instant feedback. No bouncy UI.

image_urls.description: Abstract minimalist dark mode architectural structure with amber lines. Use in marketing hero with bg-black/50 overlay.
Frosted glass floating over black background. Use for bento grid backgrounds or section dividers.
Rippling dark texture. Use for empty states in dashboard or pricing card backgrounds with heavy black overlay.

ide_workspace.layout: react-resizable-panels for Left Sidebar (Explorer), Center (Editor), Right (AI Chat), Bottom (Terminal).
ide_workspace.editor: @monaco-editor/react for realistic VSCode feel, configured to dark theme.
ide_workspace.ai_chat: Markdown rendering with react-markdown and syntax highlighting. Streaming text effect.
ide_workspace.tabs: Shadcn Tabs customized to look like VSCode file tabs (border-b-2 border-transparent data-[state=active]:border-amber-500 rounded-none).

marketing.buttons: Flat bg-amber-500 text-black hover:bg-amber-400 rounded-sm font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-xs py-3 px-6 for primary CTA. Ghost/outline for secondary.
marketing.bento_grid: Grid layout for features. Asymmetrical spans.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast standards. Dimmed text must be readable.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='ide-run-button', data-testid='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Cabinet Grotesk', 'Chivo', and 'JetBrains Mono'. You can import them via @fontsource or google fonts.
Ensure the AI Chat interface looks distinct, mimicking Cursor/ChatGPT with model selector chip (Claude/GPT/Gemini).
Build the dashboard using a dense, border-collapse 'Control Room' grid styling. No heavy shadows, rely on 1px borders.
The marketing site should use Framer Motion for reveal animations and a premium, spacious 'Tetris Grid'.
Never use generic Shadcn out-of-the-box appearance for the marketing site. Strip it and apply custom classes.
Add 'data-testid' to every interactive element (buttons, links, inputs, tabs).
